hero.title: Build Without Boundaries
hero.subtitle: A premium production-ready experience featuring instant language localization and secure French OTP authentication.

features.title: Key Features
features.i18n_desc: Switch languages instantly across English, Spanish, Hindi, Portuguese, and Chinese with state persistence.
features.security_desc: Accessing French requires an OTP sent to your verified email address to maintain security standards.
features.design_desc: Experience a stunning, fully responsive aesthetic utilizing custom Tailwind styles and smooth animations.

modal.desc_email: To activate French, we require a verification check. Please enter your email address to receive a secure OTP.
modal.desc_otp: We have sent a 6-digit verification code to:
modal.error_attempts: Maximum attempts reached. Please request a new code.
modal.error_invalid_otp: Invalid OTP code. Please check and try again.
